data.title: Institute for Portfolio Alternatives reveals 2026 Board of Directors, led by CEO Anya Coverman.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Anya Coverman, CEO of the Institute for Portfolio Alternatives (IPA), revealed the 2026 Board of Directors. The announcement included the appointment of new directors and the election of Board members.

data.title: Crypto adoption is surging in Argentina, Nigeria, & the Philippines, with users seeking financial security through digital assets.
data.description: Cryptocurrency has predominantly targeted the US and EU markets; however, significant adoption is taking place in countries like Argentina, Nigeria, and the Philippines. These regions are witnessing a surge in the usage of digital assets as they address crucial survival challenges for the populations.

data.title: Asante Gold Corp (TSXV: ASE | GSE: ASG | FRANKFURT: 1A9 | OTCQX: ASGOF) starts trading on TSXV with symbol ASE.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on September 24, 2025, Asante Gold Corporation (TSXV: ASE | GSE: ASG | FRANKFURT:1A9 | OTCQX: ASGOF) referred to as "Asante" or the "Company," disclosed that its common shares known as "Common Shares" will begin trading on the TSX Venture Exchange "TSXV" under the symbol ASE.

data.title: ResVita Bio's positive FDA Pre-IND meeting advances RVB-003 for Netherton Syndrome towards IND filing in early 2026 in Calif.
data.description: In Berkeley, California on September 24, 2025, ResVita Bio shared news of a successful face-to-face meeting with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration regarding their innovative continuous protein therapy for skin ailments. This Pre-Investigational New Drug (Pre-IND) meeting marked a significant step forward for the biotechnology company as they work towards advancing their skin disease treatment. The details about the meeting, including key figures and outcomes, were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: Beneration found $200M in billing errors affecting 110,000 employees, urging employers to take action.
data.description: In Philadelphia, Beneration, a renowned benefits reconciliation and compliance solutions provider, discovered billing discrepancies totaling more than $200 million. These discrepancies impacted 110,000 employees across numerous employers in the last year. Rick Hirsh, Beneration's CEO, highlighted that the findings indicate significant financial losses for employers due to disjointed systems and manual procedures. Hirsh emphasized the necessity for organizations to adopt more sophisticated tools to safeguard their budgets and meet compliance standards, particularly as healthcare costs continue to rise.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer introduces UpToDate Expert AI for clinical decision support, aiding doctors and health systems.
data.description: Wolters Kluwer Health, based in Waltham, Massachusetts, has introduced UpToDate® Expert AI, an innovative clinical decision support (CDS) tool powered by generative artificial intelligence (AI). This new solution aims to cater to the requirements of physicians and healthcare systems efficiently. UpToDate Expert AI redefines the accessibility of evidence-based responses to medical queries during patient care, establishing a higher benchmark. It assists healthcare professionals in seamlessly obtaining reliable information at the point of care, while aiding healthcare institutions in the responsible incorporation of AI into their systems and operations.

data.title: Textron (NYSE: TXT) will release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 23, with a conference call at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern). Call details: (888) 596-4144 (U.S.), (646) 968-2525 (outside U.S.), Access Code: 6969175.
data.description: Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) is set to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 on the morning of October 23, 2025. Following this release, a conference call is scheduled at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern) on the same day to delve into the results and provide insights into the company's future prospects. Interested individuals can tune into the call through a webcast on www.textron.com or by making a direct call to (888) 596-4144 within the U.S. or (646) 968-2525 outside the U.S. using the Access Code: 6969175. Furthermore, a recording of the call will be accessible for playback at a later time.

data.title: Cryptocurrency TON oversold at $2.83, RSI 29.07. Analysts predict rebound from support levels.
data.description: The price of TON is currently trading at $2.83, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 29.07, signaling that the asset is in oversold territory. Analysts believe that there may be a potential rebound from important support levels based on technical analysis.

data.title: South Africa's Fruit and Vegetables processing industry report for 2025 includes profiles of 17 key industry players.
data.description: A recent report titled "Preserving and Processing of Fruit and Vegetables in South Africa 2025" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report delves into the processing and preservation methods of various fruits and vegetables in South Africa, focusing on deciduous, citrus, and subtropical fruits along with dried and frozen options, juices, purees, and vegetables. The report provides detailed insights on the industry's scope and condition, covering aspects like manufacturing sales, production figures, and market size.

data.title: Zephyr launches Presrv™ Refrigerator Freezer Drawers as part of collection, offering dual-zone model for homeowners.
data.description: In a press release dated September 24, 2025, Zephyr announced the launch of its latest product in the Presrv™ Collection, the Presrv™ Refrigerator Freezer Drawers, in San Francisco. This innovative dual-zone model offers homeowners a versatile solution for their kitchen needs. Zephyr, known for transforming kitchen experiences through cutting-edge design and exceptional customer service, continues to push boundaries with this new addition.

data.title: Nira Medical & Rocky Mountain MS Clinic to unveil AI-powered MS Registry at ECTRIMS, integrating Century Health's LLM & EHRs with 130k+ clinical variables, boosting MS research.
data.description: Nira Medical and Rocky Mountain recently announced a partnership to incorporate Century Health's innovative large language model (LLM) with electronic health records (EHRs). This integration efficiently provided access to over 130,000 clinical variables. The collaboration aims to drive research in multiple sclerosis (MS) treatment and care. The joint effort between the companies based in Salt Lake City and New York is poised to significantly impact advancements in medical research.

data.title: Banks could gain $110B in deposits by improving credit scores; checking accounts linking with credit bureaus most valuable to consumers.
data.description: A recently conducted study by Cornerstone Advisors, a prominent business and technology provider based in Scottsdale, Arizona, revealed the high value consumers with subprime/near-prime credit scores place on checking accounts that include rent and bill payment reporting to credit bureaus. The research conducted on September 24, 2025, highlighted that individuals with lower credit scores highly appreciate this feature, indicating its usefulness for those aiming to build or improve credit.

data.title: Global Battery Management System market valued at USD 13.4 Bn in 2025, expected to reach USD 52.38 Bn by 2032 with a CAGR of 21.5%, driven by EV adoption and automotive sector dominance. Asia Pacific to lead market growth with 40.7% share in 2025. EV sales predicted to exceed 20 million in 2025, boosting demand for battery management systems. High costs a limiting factor for market growth, despite opportunities in the renewable energy sector.
data.description: The Global Battery Management System Market is projected to grow significantly, with an estimated value of USD 13.4 billion in 2025, expected to reach USD 52.38 billion by 2032 at a CAGR of 21.5%. The market growth is driven by the increasing adoption of electric vehicles, renewable energy solutions, and portable electronic devices, with the automotive sector dominating the market. By 2025, the automotive segment is anticipated to account for over two-fifths of the global market share. Asia Pacific is forecasted to hold a 40.7% market share in 2025. The surge in electric vehicle adoption, with global electric car sales predicted to exceed 20 million in 2025, is fueling the demand for battery management systems. However, the high costs associated with advanced battery management systems, requiring precision sensors, microcontrollers, and sophisticated software, could limit market growth to some extent. Investments in renewable energy sources are also creating new growth opportunities in the battery management system market.
